$comment: Archon did:cid realization of Tom Jones' 'Consent to Create Binding Request' (Creating a Relationship Binding, 2026). Each property maps to a numbered field in the paper; see docs/field-mapping.md. The signed-VC envelope (item 1 message id, 14 subject public key, 15 signature, 16 encryption) is supplied natively by Archon issuance and is intentionally NOT modeled as claims.
title: RelationshipBindingRequest

messageId.description: Field 1 - Identifier of the message (nonce / sequence / state). Protocol-level dedupe.

issuer.description: Field 2 (MANDATORY) - did:cid of the CSP / service provider that is the AUDIENCE of this request and supplies the encryption key.

subject.description: Field 3 (MANDATORY) - did:cid of the grantor (the user). Replaces the paper's UUID with a resolvable DID = the durable relationship anchor.

subjectRole.description: Field 4 (MANDATORY) - relationship of subject to the owner of the information.

context.description: Field 5 (MANDATORY) - trust framework(s). did:cid of an Archon group / trust registry establishing the context. May be multiple (family -> country).

subjectAttributes.description: Field 6 (OPTIONAL) - claims about contact (email / mobile) needed for registration notices. Pseudonymous values permitted.

permissions.description: Field 7 (MANDATORY) - opt-in grants over the subject information. No entry = no consent. May reference an Authorization Code or a policy language (e.g. cedar).

contractualTerms.description: Field 7 (cont.) - optional contractual binding (e.g. MyTerms) intended to be legally acceptable when accepted by each service.

deviceStatement.description: Field 8 (MANDATORY for AAL2+) - attestation the Issuer uses to verify protection of the subject's private key.

identityProof.description: Field 9 (MANDATORY) - proofing documents / personhood (CAPTCHA) references, or did:cid of held VCs. 'None' is acceptable. Array so multiple proofs (IAL2+) can be supplied; may carry legal jurisdiction of the subject.

purposeOfUse.description: Field 10 (MANDATORY for assurance > level 1) - reason / intent. See Purpose Query.

acr.description: Field 11 (OPTIONAL) - authentication context class ref, used only when Purpose is inadequate to establish required assurance of the resulting Entity Statement.

expirationDate.description: Field 13 (OPTIONAL) - Linux epoch seconds. Time-limits the relationship.
